title: Tailors, Dressmakers, and Custom Sewers
description: Design, make, alter, repair, or fit garments.

tasks.text: Measure parts, such as sleeves or pant legs, and mark or pin-fold alteration lines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove stitches from garments to be altered, using rippers or razor blades.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sew garments, using needles and thread or sewing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Let out or take in seams in suits and other garments to improve fit.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure customers, using tape measures, and record measurements.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Fit and study garments on customers to determine required alterations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim excess material, using scissors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble garment parts and join parts with basting stitches, using needles and thread or sewing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make garment style changes, such as tapering pant legs, narrowing lapels, and adding or removing padding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain garment drape and proportions as alterations are performed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take up or let down hems to shorten or lengthen garment parts, such as sleeves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace defective garment parts, such as pockets, zippers, snaps, buttons, and linings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Press garments, using hand irons or pressing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit, alter, repair, and make made-to-measure clothing, according to customers' and clothing manufacturers' specifications and fit, and applying principles of garment design, construction, and styling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate how much a garment will cost to make, based on factors such as time and material requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position patterns of garment parts on fabric, and cut fabric along outlines, using scissors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record required alterations and instructions on tags, and attach them to garments.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Confer with customers to determine types of material and garment styles desired.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine tags on garments to determine alterations that are needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop, copy, or adapt designs for garments, and design patterns to fit measurements, applying knowledge of garment design, construction, styling, and fabric.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Put in padding and shaping materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sew buttonholes and attach buttons to finish garments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
